a:r.a:t: Google Maps SDK, Directions API, Distance Matrix
Reserve charging slots by preferred time, reducing conflicts and improving accuracy.
Backend sync ensures accurate slot status, minimizing double bookings.
Map integration with optimal routes, ETA, and distance guidance.
Cancels bookings when users miss arrival windows, preventing slot waste.
Tracks location to detect arrival and
Maintains a queue when slots are full
Confirms users can reach the station on time before booking.
Uses the phone to auto-update arrival and departure without manual input.
Optimizes app performance with minimal data
Web panel to monitor stations, manage slots, and track revenue.
Vendors register stations, configure slots, pricing, and operations.
